subject: Biology
title: Commensalism: Free Riders
description: A quick win: understand Commensalism: Free Riders.

hook.text: Remora fish hitch rides on sharks, eating scraps. The shark doesn't seem to care either way.

buildup.text: In commensalism, one species benefits while the other is neither helped nor harmed.

discovery.text: Birds nest in trees. The bird gains shelter; the tree is unaffected.

twist.text: True commensalism may be rare. On closer study, many 'neutral' partners turn out to be slightly affected.

climax.text: Even subtle interactions matter. Ecology is about relationships, even the quiet ones.

punchline.text: Some species just ride along quietly.

quiz.question: In commensalism, how is the host species affected?
options: It is neither helped nor harmed
